query:
-- First, let's see the full picture
SELECT phoneNumber, status, priority, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM call_queue 
WHERE phoneNumber IN ('0000000000', '*43') 
GROUP BY phoneNumber, status, priority 
ORDER BY phoneNumber, status;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3tmNk4KiQphQsi9.6a10ffd04b61 --database QaP68Z2AATogwpccsoDAFH --execute

SELECT phoneNumber, status, priority, COUNT(*) as cnt
